title: Reproducible lexical analysis pipeline (Reinert/IRaMuTeQ, Python and R)
description: Reproducible Python and R pipeline reimplementing the Reinert descending hierarchical classification (the IRaMuTeQ method), with cross-validation between the two implementations, used to reanalyze focus-group transcripts on nutritional challenges in pediatric oncology. Independent reimplementation; the IRaMuTeQ dictionaries and canonical R scripts are third-party components obtained separately (see NOTICE). Sensitive transcripts are not included.
